name: Rotini with Chickpeas, Sausage and Herbs (Dupree)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound hot Italian sausage, cut into 2-inch chunks
20 ounces frozen spinach, thawed and dried
15 ounces garbanzo beans, drained and rinsed
1 pound plum tomatoes, seeded and cut into wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and drain the pasta according to package instructions.
2. Seed and wedge the tomatoes.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Lightly grease a 9x13-inch baking pan.
4. In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add sausage, onion, garlic, rosemary, basil, and oregano. Cook, stirring, until sausage is browned, about 8-10 minutes.
5. Add red wine vinegar to the skillet.
6. In a large bowl, combine pasta (1 cup = 4 oz), spinach, beans, tomatoes, spaghetti sauce, and sausage mixture. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Pour the mixture into the prepared baking pan, top with Parmesan cheese, and bake until the cheese is browned and the casserole is bubbly, about 30 minutes.
